bead.title: agent/test: migrate RunOptions test sites (5-10 sites)
bead.description:
Stage 2 of SD-024. Mechanical migration of every test that constructs RunOptions{...}.

In-scope:
- cli/internal/agent/agent_test.go and any sibling test using RunOptions
- cli/internal/agent/prompt_ingress_oversize_test.go
bead.acceptance: rg 'RunOptions\\{|CompareOptions\\{|QuorumOptions\\{' cli/ returns 0 matches outside the type definitions about to be retired. cd cli && go test ./... passes.

events.body:
**AC#1 unmet, in-scope file**: `cli/internal/agent/prompt_ingress_oversize_test.go` lines 78, 85, 112 still construct `RunOptions{...}`. The bead description lists this file as in-scope; commit message reclassifies it as out-of-scope without updating the AC.
**AC#1 broader scope**: The criterion as written ("0 matches… outside the type definitions about to be retired") is global. If the intent was test-only and high-level-Run-only, the AC text needs to be narrowed (e.g., "0 matches in `agent_test.go`, `runner_test.go`, `script_test.go`") and the bead reopened with that AC, or the remaining test sites (`session_index_test.go`, `models_test.go`, `virtual_test.go`, `claude_stream_test.go`, BuildArgs callers in `agent_test.go`) must be migrated.
**Test-suite confirmation missing**: No evidence in the diff or execution manifest that `go test ./...` was run against the post-merge tree. Recommend the next worker either re-confirm or include it in evidence.
**Path forward**: simplest fix is splitting follow-up beads for (a) `prompt_ingress_oversize_test.go`, (b) remaining `*_test.go` RunOptions sites, (c) production-code migration, then closing this bead with a narrower AC. As-is, the AC's grep gate fails on the current tree.
